_doc: Pilot grid for the SDE stochasticity knob alpha and the smallest-valid-alpha rule (refine-logs/EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md Phase 1). Primary operating alpha = the SMALLEST alpha that produces measurable tail diversity (>= diversity_min) while preserving valid generated audio (audio-validity guard >= audio_validity_min). The full A(axis,s,alpha) surface is reported as secondary evidence; the single primary alpha drives the headline s_commit. If no alpha qualifies -> FORK_ALPHA_NO_VALID_OPERATING_POINT. primary_alpha is selected at runtime (null until then).
